description: Create a professional electronic schematic for a 555 Timer Astable Multivibrator circuit in draw.io using standard electrical symbols. Follow the connectivity instructions provided in the netlist file at ~/Desktop/555_netlist.txt. The schematic must include and label all specified components (555 Timer IC, resistors R1 and R2, capacitor C1, LED D1 with limiting resistor R3, VCC, and GND) with their reference designators and values. Save the diagram to ~/Desktop/555_schematic.drawio and export it as a PNG image to ~/Desktop/555_schematic.png.
